data.title: All about Metaplanet’s Bitcoin strategy after raising $137M
data.description:
Metaplanet raises ¥21 billion to expand Bitcoin holdings, eyeing ‘1% Bitcoin Club’ despite market risks.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/all-about-metaplanets-bitcoin-strategy-after-raising-137m/

data.title: Gold, Silver, and Copper Prices Plummet, Triggering $120 Million Token Sell-Off
data.description: Prices of gold, silver, and copper have experienced a significant decline, leading to a $120 million sell-off in blockchain tokens that replicate these metals. According to NS3.AI, despite the downturn in metal prices, Bitcoin remains unaffected, trading independently and underscoring its growing role as a standalone risk asset. This divergence indicates a shift in investor behavior, with cryptocurrencies increasingly being viewed separately from traditional commodities.

data.title: a16z co-founders followed Moltbook's official Twitter account, and Moltbook briefly surpassed $25 million, setting a new record.
data.description: The recent surge in MOLT's market capitalization may have been triggered by Marc Andreessen's X account following MLTbook with leverage. According to GMGN data, MOLT's market capitalization briefly surpassed $25 million, reaching a new all-time high, and is currently trading at $19.77 million, a 1-hour increase of 107%. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coin is highly volatile, and investors should participate with caution.

data.title: Yesterday, I bought 1.243 million HYPE tokens and sold them all at a price of $28.80, expecting a loss of $5.5 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, a whale that bought 1.243 million HYPE tokens yesterday at an average price of $33.2 and sold them all at a price of $28.8 is expected to lose $5.5 million.

data.title: Bitcoin’s Value vs Gold Nears 2017 Levels Despite “Hype,” Peter Schiff Says
data.description:
Bitcoin’s value against gold has fallen near 2017 levels, reviving doubts about its role as a long-term store of value.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoins-value-vs-gold-nears-2017-levels-despite-hype-peter-schiff-says/

data.title: Citi India Appoints Ankur Khurana as Head of Commercial Banking
data.description:
Citi's India division has appointed Ankur Khurana as the head of its commercial banking unit. According to Jin10, the Wall Street bank aims to enhance its services for India's rapidly expanding mid-sized enterprises. Khurana brings over two decades of banking experience, having previously served as the co-head of coverage for India and South Asia at Standard Chartered Bank. The position had been vacant since July of the previous year when veteran banker Bhanu Vohra left to join the Indian branch of global consultancy BDO. 

India is witnessing a surge in transaction activities, with significant growth in equity capital markets and mergers and acquisitions. As Indian companies continue to expand and engage in overseas acquisitions, the mid-market sector presents extensive opportunities.

data.title: MGBX will list clawd.atg.eth (CLAWD) spot trading.
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will be listed on clawd.atg.eth (CLAWD) on January 30, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT). Spot trading deposit opening time: January 30, 2026 at 17:00 (SGT). Trading opening time: January 30, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT). Withdrawal opening time: February 2, 2026 at 19:00 (SGT). The clawd.atg.eth project is a very popular AI Agent + Meme coin experiment on the Base chain, initiated and deeply involved by Austin Griffith, a well-known developer of the Ethereum Foundation.

data.title: Upbit releases audit report on digital assets and deposits: 105.72% of its funds are available for customer payments.
data.description: Upbit released an "Audit Report on Digital Assets and Deposits" audited by Sunghyun Certified Public Accountants on January 1, 2026, which disclosed that Upbit holds approximately 103.19% of the digital assets it intends to pay its customers, and the deposit audit results show that Upbit holds 105.72% of the funds available for paying its customers.

data.title: Nikita Bier, product manager for X, initiated a poll regarding "closing down the X community".
data.description: Nikita Bier, X Product Manager and Solana Consultant, launched a poll asking, "Would you be happy or sad if X Community were shut down?" The poll will end in 23 hours, and currently, 53.9% are sad and 46.1% are happy.

data.title: Trader Engages in High-Leverage Short Position on Ethereum
data.description:
On January 30, a trader executed a short position on 601.94 ETH using 25x leverage at an average entry price of $2730.93. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the position is currently showing a slight unrealized profit.

The trader is known for favoring high-leverage short strategies and has recently demonstrated strong performance with frequent large-scale opening and closing of positions.

data.title: CZ: FUD Does Not Hurt the Target but Damages the Market
data.description: Changpeng Zhao (CZ), Binance founder and former CEO, posted on X stating that FUD (fear, uncertainty, and doubt) does not hurt targets such as himself, but it negatively impacts the broader market.CZ stated that neither he nor Binance has engaged in any meaningful large-scale selling. He explained that his personal selling is limited to routine card payments, giving an example where approximately $5 worth of BNB is converted to cover everyday expenses such as coffee.He added that while he no longer runs Binance, based on his understanding, the company only converts a portion of its revenue to cover operating expenses and remains a net holder overall. CZ also noted that Binance now has a global regulator that is able to review trades across accounts on the platform.CZ emphasized that the public should avoid being misinformed and encouraged individuals to focus their efforts on positive self-improvement.

data.title: Potential Hawkish Shift in Federal Reserve Leadership Raises Market Concerns
data.description: On January 30, Jin10 reported that Sonu Varghese, a global macro strategist at Carson Group, expressed concerns about the potential nomination of Kevin Warsh as the Federal Reserve Chair. According to Jin10, Varghese noted that Warsh has historically been hawkish, despite his recent discussions on interest rate cuts. If Warsh advocates for significant rate reductions upon joining the Federal Reserve, he may struggle to convince others of the necessity for further cuts. This scenario could lead to a deeply divided committee that refrains from implementing rate cuts altogether. In the short term, a potentially hawkish Federal Reserve could increase market volatility.

data.title: The appointment of "hawkish" Warsh to head the Federal Reserve could trigger internal divisions within the Fed and market volatility.
data.description: Sonu Varghese, global macro strategist at Carson Group, said that if Warsh is indeed nominated to chair the Federal Reserve, we may end up with a Fed that is actually somewhat hawkish. Kevin Warsh has historically been a hawk, although he has recently been talking about rate cuts. If he enters the Fed advocating for significant rate cuts, he may not have much credibility in convincing others that further rate cuts are needed. We might even end up with a deeply divided committee that doesn't cut rates at all. In the short term, a potentially hawkish Fed could increase market volatility. (Jinshi)

data.title: The Shanghai branch of the People's Bank of China: Further advance the pilot program of multilateral central bank digital currency bridges to ensure the preparation and operation of the IMF Shanghai Center.
data.description: The Shanghai Headquarters of the People's Bank of China (PBOC) held a press conference for the first quarter of 2026, introducing the financial operations in Shanghai in 2025 and answering questions from reporters. Zhou Peng, Deputy Director of the Monetary and Credit Research Department of the PBOC Shanghai Headquarters, stated that the PBOC Shanghai Headquarters has made a series of new progress in promoting the construction of Shanghai as an international financial center, and has facilitated the implementation of the policy on refinancing of blockchain-based letters of credit for shipping and trade. The International Operation Center for Digital RMB has officially commenced operations in Shanghai, and the pilot program for multilateral central bank digital currency bridges is also progressing in depth. Efforts are being made to launch the online payment function for bank cards and digital RMB hard wallets for gate access on all Shanghai rail transit lines, and full support is being provided for the preparation and operation of the International Monetary Fund (IMF) Shanghai Center.

data.title: Binance will update funding rates for TradFi perpetual contracts such as XAUUSDT.
data.description: According to the official announcement, starting from 20:15 (UTC+8) on January 30, 2026, Binance Futures will adjust the settlement frequency of funding fees for XAUUSDT, XAGUSDT, and TSLAUSDT perpetual contracts, changing it from once every four hours to once every eight hours. The upper/lower limit of the funding fee for XAUUSDT and XAGUSDT perpetual contracts will be adjusted from ±0.375% to ±0.05%.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list Kindred Labs (KIN), with an airdrop eligibility threshold of 241 points.
data.description: According to the official announcement, trading of Kindred Labs (KIN) on Binance Alpha will begin on January 30, 2026 at 19:00 (UTC+8). Users holding at least 241 Binance Alpha Points can claim a token airdrop. The airdrop of 600 KIN tokens will be available on the Alpha event page on a first-come, first-served basis. If the event continues, the point threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every five minutes. Claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page; otherwise, they will be considered to have forfeited their airdrop.

source: https://x.com/BSCNews/status/2017120776722534784

data.title: Potential Impact of Christopher Waller's Appointment on Interest Rates
data.description: Mizuho Securities' chief strategist Shoki Omori suggests that the appointment of Christopher Waller as the new Federal Reserve chair could lead to sustained pressure for interest rate cuts. According to NS3.AI, recent FOMC votes indicate that achieving these cuts may not be straightforward under Waller's leadership. The market appears to be overestimating the speed at which rate cuts will occur, likely resulting in a slower pace than anticipated. This scenario is expected to contribute to an increase in the USD/JPY exchange rate.

data.title: Senators Question Deputy Attorney General's Crypto Holdings Amid Regulatory Changes
data.description:
Six Democratic senators have raised concerns about Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche's potential conflict of interest due to his significant cryptocurrency holdings. According to NS3.AI, Blanche is accused of easing regulatory enforcement on cryptocurrency while possessing substantial crypto assets. His recent memo led to the disbandment of the Department of Justice's National Cryptocurrency Enforcement Team and halted criminal investigations into various crypto-related activities.

The senators have pointed to an increase in illicit cryptocurrency use and are demanding transparency regarding Blanche's delayed divestment from his crypto holdings. They are also seeking clarity on his communications with the cryptocurrency industry. The situation has sparked a debate over the ethical implications of holding crypto assets while influencing regulatory policies.

data.title: Data: The market capitalization of USD1 surpasses $5 billion, setting a new record.
data.description: According to Coingecko data, the market capitalization of USD1, a stablecoin launched by WLFI, a crypto project of the Trump family, has exceeded $5 billion, currently trading at $5,049,275,677, setting a new record. It has also surpassed DAI to become the fifth largest stablecoin by market capitalization, after USDT, USDC, USDS, and USDE.
